# Jena-specific server-info fields (impl detail)
endpoint: admin_server
classification: implementation-detail
match_mode: structural-json
ignore_fields: name, version, description, built_at, datasets_count, features
description: Jena emits these specific keys; OxiRS may or may not (impl-detail)

=== request
GET /$/server

=== response
200
Content-Type: application/json

{"version":"4.10.0","datasets":[],"server":"Apache Jena Fuseki"}
